prompt: prometheus 的高流失率会造成什么影响，有什么系统的方案可以解决？各家云厂商有没有现有方案？
article:
先说结论：**Prometheus 的高流失率（series churn）本质上不是“样本太多”，而是“时间序列集合变化太快”**。它会优先打爆 **head 内存、WAL、remote write 系列缓存、索引与 compaction 路径**，再间接拖慢查询、规则评估和重启恢复；如果再叠加高基数，通常就是 Prometheus 最危险的工作负载之一 [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/) [[8]](https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)(https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)。**系统性解法一定是“先治源头，再治采集，再治 TSDB/架构”**；云厂商和分布式后端主要是**承受/吸收**高 churn，而不是自动替你修正错误的指标模型 [[117]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice) [[118]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls) [[161]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/) [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)。

更直白地说，**高基数解决的是“你常驻地养了多少序列”，高 churn 解决的是“你多久重建一次这批序列”**。前者主要消耗稳态内存和查询扇出，后者主要冲击写路径与元数据生命周期；两者叠加时，Prometheus 会同时在“稳态占用”和“变化成本”两端失血。这也是为什么很多团队在“总样本量没有明显上涨”的情况下，仍会在发布高峰、HPA 波动或短作业洪峰时突然 OOM、remote write 堵塞、规则评估超时。

---

## 先把概念说清：高流失率不等于高基数

**高基数**指你当前有多少条不同时间序列；**高流失率**指这组时间序列变化得有多快，也就是新序列不断创建、旧序列不断失活/消失的速度 [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)。Prometheus 里，一条时间序列由**指标名 + 全部标签键值对**唯一确定；任何标签值变化，都会变成新 series，而不是旧 series 的后续样本 [[4]](https://prometheus.io/)(https://prometheus.io/) [[33]](https://prometheus.io/docs/concepts/data_model/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/concepts/data_model/)。Prometheus 官方在 OTLP 配置里甚至直接提醒：如果把所有 resource attributes 都提升成 labels，属性变化会导致 **time series churn** 并增加内存使用 [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)。

这也是为什么：

- **高基数不一定高流失率**：比如某服务长期稳定地暴露很多 label 组合，series 很多，但集合很稳定 [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)。
- **高流失率不一定高基数**：比如总活跃序列数不算特别高，但每分钟都在生成/淘汰新 Pod、新 Job、新容器 ID，对写路径冲击会很大 [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality) [[9]](https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)(https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)。
- **两者叠加最危险**：因为既有大量 series 常驻内存和索引，又有大量新旧 series 反复创建销毁，TSDB 的元数据路径、WAL 和查询都会同时吃压 [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[20]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)。

一个实务上非常重要、但常被混淆的点是：**cardinality 更像库存，churn 更像库存周转率**。库存高，仓库会满；周转率高，装卸、登记、搬运会崩。Prometheus 的 TSDB 恰好同时对这两种压力敏感，所以判断问题时不能只看一个数。

### 怎么量化高流失率

最实用的几组观测信号是：

- **活跃序列数**：`prometheus_tsdb_head_series`，反映 head block 中的序列数量 [[10]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/planning-capacity/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/planning-capacity/) [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)。
- **新建/移除速率**：`rate(prometheus_tsdb_head_series_created_total[5m])` 和 `rate(prometheus_tsdb_head_series_removed_total[5m])`，用于看单位时间 churn [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)。
- **TSDB 状态接口**：`/api/v1/status/tsdb` 可返回 `headStats.numSeries`、`seriesCountByMetricName`、`seriesCountByLabelPair`、`memoryInBytesByLabelName` 等，用来定位热点 metric 和标签对 [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)。
- **WAL / remote write 侧**：`prometheus_tsdb_wal_segment_current`、`prometheus_wal_watcher_current_segment`、`prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending`、`prometheus_remote_storage_shards_desired`、`prometheus_remote_storage_queue_highest_sent_timestamp_seconds` 等，可判断 churn 是否已传导到 WAL 和远端写队列 [[14]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

一个常见误区是只盯着 `head_series` 绝对值。**如果 head series 中等，但 created/removed 两个速率长期都很高，你面对的更可能是 churn，而不是稳态高基数** [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view) [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)。另一个误区是以为业界有统一“危险阈值”；实际上 Prometheus 官方非常少给一刀切数字，更多强调结合内存、WAL、查询和你自己的发布节奏来设阈值 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/) [[21]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/1.8/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/1.8/storage/)。

更可执行的判定方式不是“超过某个绝对值就危险”，而是看**四个量是否同步恶化**：  
1. `head_series` 是否在发布/扩缩期间抬升；  
2. `created_total` 与 `removed_total` 是否同时加速；  
3. `samples_pending` 是否开始积压；  
4. 查询/规则评估延迟是否在同一时间窗抖动。  
如果四者同向变化，几乎可以直接判定：你遇到的不是单纯高基数，而是**高 churn 已经向写路径和查询路径双向传导**。

### 一个最容易误判的场景

很多团队看到滚动发布时 Pod 数只比平时多出默认的 **25% max surge**，就误以为 TSDB 压力也只会增加约 25%。这在 Prometheus 里通常是错的。原因有三层：

1. **新 Pod 的 `pod`、`pod_ip`、`instance`、`pod-template-hash` 变了，就是一整套新序列。**  
2. **旧序列不会在旧 Pod 删除瞬间从 head 中“无痕消失”**；它们会先变 stale，再等待 compaction 或相关清理机制处理。  
3. **每个 Pod 往往不止一个指标源**：应用指标、sidecar 指标、kube-state-metrics 状态指标、node 关联指标都可能同时复制一份生命周期变化。

所以即使 Pod 数的瞬时增量只有 25%，`head_series` 在一轮并发发布窗口里出现成倍放大并不反常，尤其是多个 Deployment 同时滚、再叠加 sidecar 和短 Job 时更明显 [[35]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/) [[9]](https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)(https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)。

---

## 高流失率到底会造成什么影响

## 1）TSDB 与内存：最先受伤的不是样本，而是元数据

Prometheus 的当前写入数据先进入 **in-memory head block**，并由 **WAL** 保证崩溃恢复 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。高 churn 下，问题不是“多了几个点”，而是**不断出现大量新 series 对象、标签集合、索引项和 chunk 元数据** [[8]](https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)(https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/) [[20]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)。Prometheus v2.19 的内存优化文档明确指出：高 churn 时，很多序列永远填不满一个 120-sample chunk，因此无法充分受益于 full-chunk mmap 优化，内存下降幅度会明显低于低 churn 场景 [[8]](https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)(https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)。

近年的官方机制已经说明 Prometheus 把这当成现实生产问题处理。`stale_series_compaction_threshold` 允许在内存中 stale series 占比过高时提前触发 compaction，把 stale series 从内存刷到磁盘并移出内存 [[17]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/docs/configuration/configuration.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/docs/configuration/configuration.md)。Prometheus TSDB maintainer 在 2026 年 SREcon 议程页上直接把高频部署下的现象描述为：Pod 来来去去，Prometheus 在内存里累积 stale series，导致内存尖峰和 OOM [[9]](https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)(https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)。

这里的因果链要说透：**新 series 创建** 不只是多一条数据，而是多一份 labels、索引 entry、head 中的 series 结构体、潜在 chunk、WAL 里的 series record，以及后续 compaction 里必须被处理的一条元数据路径。高 churn 的杀伤力，恰恰来自“这些成本很多与样本条数弱相关、与序列生命周期强相关”。

## 2）WAL 与 remote write：高 churn 会放大写路径成本

Prometheus WAL 至少保留 3 个 128MB segment，高流量实例会保留更多，以覆盖至少 2 小时原始数据 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。高 churn 会让 WAL 中除了样本记录，还出现更多 series 定义和元数据活动，造成更快的 segment 滚动、更重的 replay 和更大的 remote write 压力 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/) [[14]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)。

更关键的是，**remote write 会被高 churn 特别放大**。Prometheus 官方明确说明，remote write 会为 WAL 中每个 series 维护一个 **series ID 到 labels 的缓存**，而“大量 series churn 会显著增加这部分内存” [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。官方给出的经验是 remote write 常让 Prometheus 内存增加约 **25%**，但高 churn 会进一步推高这个数字 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。所以：**把高 churn 数据直接 remote write 出去，并不等于把本地压力卸掉，反而可能在本地多复制一份元数据压力** [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

另一个经常被忽略的机械约束是：remote write 是按 shard 队列批量发送的；**任何一个 shard 回压并写满队列，都可能阻塞从 WAL 继续向队列读取**。这意味着高 churn 的风险不是“慢一点”而已，而是可能把本地 WAL 消费链卡死，随后表现为 `samples_pending` 累积、`shards_desired` 拉高、发送时间戳落后扩大，最终逼近 WAL 可缓冲窗口 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

## 3）索引、postings、compaction：高 churn 是典型的“元数据放大器”

Prometheus block index 里包含 symbol table、series、label index、postings 等结构；每出现一组新标签组合，就要增加新的 series entry，并进入若干 label pair 的 postings list [[20]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)。因此即便“同时活跃”的 series 数不算夸张，**一个时间窗口内出现过很多短命 series，也会让 block index 和 postings entries 变大** [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality) [[20]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)。

compaction 也会更重。Prometheus 的 compaction 要对 block 做多路合并、去重、重写索引和 chunk；高 churn 会增加 block 中需要处理的 series 数量与稀疏度，即便每条序列样本不多，元数据工作量依然上升 [[24]](https://ganeshvernekar.com/blog/prometheus-tsdb-compaction-and-retention/)(https://ganeshvernekar.com/blog/prometheus-tsdb-compaction-and-retention/) [[19]](https://grafana.com/blog/2019/12/05/promcon-recap-a-look-at-tsdb-one-year-in/)(https://grafana.com/blog/2019/12/05/promcon-recap-a-look-at-tsdb-one-year-in/)。

这也是为什么某些系统在高 churn 下不是先爆磁盘，而是先爆 **index / cache / compactor CPU**。VictoriaMetrics 官方 FAQ 对 Kubernetes 场景的描述很有代表性：典型监控里每条时间序列常带约 **30–40 个标签**，全部 `label=value` 字符串长度约 **1KB**，在生产环境里 `indexdb` 甚至可能达到 `data` 目录的 **2 倍** [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)。这个例子虽不是 Prometheus 自身实现，但它准确揭示了高 churn 的本质：**先膨胀的是元数据，不是值本身**。

## 4）查询、规则评估、告警可靠性

高 churn 不只是写入问题，也会影响查询路径。Prometheus 查询依赖 postings 交并和近时间窗口的 head 数据访问；如果 block 中充满短命、稀疏、标签组合很多的序列，查询扇出和 postings 扫描成本都会增加 [[19]](https://grafana.com/blog/2019/12/05/promcon-recap-a-look-at-tsdb-one-year-in/)(https://grafana.com/blog/2019/12/05/promcon-recap-a-look-at-tsdb-one-year-in/) [[20]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/blob/main/tsdb/docs/format/index.md)。规则评估和告警同样依赖查询；一旦高 churn 把内存、GC、WAL 或 query latency 推高，规则执行可能变慢、错过评估窗口，严重时 Prometheus OOM 或重启，告警链路就会受影响 [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/) [[22]](https://www.youtube.com/watch)(https://www.youtube.com/watch)。

真正危险的不是“平均查询慢一点”，而是**查询抖动不可预测**：  
- 平时同一条 PromQL 可能很快；  
- 发布窗口、批任务窗口、HPA 波动窗口突然变慢；  
- 规则组刚好与这些窗口重叠时，误报、漏报、延迟报都会出现。  

因此高 churn 的业务后果通常首先表现为**监控系统不稳定**，而不是“用户立刻看到 dashboard 慢 200ms”。

## 5）重启恢复变慢，甚至 OOM 后再次 OOM

Prometheus 重启后要回放 WAL 恢复 head [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。v2.19 的 mmap 优化可以让 replay 更快，但官方同时说明：收益取决于 churn，高 churn 时很多序列填不满 chunk，replay 改善有限 [[8]](https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)(https://grafana.com/blog/new-in-prometheus-v2-19-0-memory-mapping-of-full-chunks-of-the-head-block-reduces-memory-usage-by-as-much-as-40/)。Prometheus maintainer 在 2020 年演讲摘要里明确提到，大实例 restart time 可以达到 **10 分钟以上**；更糟的是，OOM 后 replay WAL 可能再次触发 OOM [[22]](https://www.youtube.com/watch)(https://www.youtube.com/watch)。这就是为什么高 churn 往往表现为“发布高峰出事、重启也不容易恢复” [[9]](https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)(https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar) [[22]](https://www.youtube.com/watch)(https://www.youtube.com/watch)。

这是一个典型的已记录失败模式：**先被 churn 打爆，随后因 WAL replay 重新加载大量元数据，再次在恢复路径上被打爆**。所以恢复预案不能只写“重启 Prometheus”，而要同时考虑**临时下调抓取面、停写高风险 job、保留 WAL 压缩、必要时先止血再恢复**。

### 影响路径总表

| 路径 | 直接机制 | 典型观测 | 最终业务后果 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Head 内存 | 新 series / stale series 累积 | `prometheus_tsdb_head_series` 抬升、RSS 增长 | OOM、GC 抖动 |
| WAL | series record 与样本都变多 | segment 滚动加快、replay 变慢 | 重启恢复慢、数据丢失风险增大 |
| Remote write | series cache + shard 回压 | `samples_pending`、发送延迟扩大 | 远端写积压、告警链路抖动 |
| Index / postings | label pair 与 postings 扩张 | `/status/tsdb` 热点标签集中 | 查询扇出增大 |
| Compaction | 稀疏短命序列增多 | compaction CPU/IO 上升 | 后台任务抢占前台资源 |
| Rules / Alerts | 查询延迟传导 | 规则评估超时、missed evaluations | 漏报、迟报、误报 |

---

## 最容易制造高流失率的场景

## 1）Kubernetes 滚动发布与短命 Pod

Deployment 每次更新 Pod template 都会创建新的 ReplicaSet，并自动打上新的 `pod-template-hash`；滚动期间新旧 ReplicaSet、旧 Pod 和新 Pod 会并存一段时间 [[35]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)。如果你的指标标签里保留了 `pod`、`pod_ip`、`pod-template-hash`、`instance` 等变化维度，每次发布都相当于创造一整套新序列 [[35]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/) [[49]](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)。这就是为什么“发布越频繁，Prometheus 越容易炸”，即便业务流量并没暴涨 [[9]](https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar)(https://www.usenix.org/conference/srecon26americas/presentation/vernekar) [[35]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/)。

这里最危险的不是单次发版，而是**高频滚动 + 多个 Deployment 同时滚动 + sidecar 普遍存在**。因为每个 Pod 变化都会在应用指标、mesh 指标、KSM 指标三个层面各复制一次生命周期差异。

## 2）CronJob / Batch Job / 短作业

CronJob 周期性创建 Job，Job 再创建新 Pod；Job 名、controller UID、Pod 名都会变化 [[38]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/cron-jobs/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/cron-jobs/) [[39]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/job/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/job/)。如果监控链路保留了 `job-name`、`controller-uid`、`pod` 等标签，每次调度就是一批全新 series [[38]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/cron-jobs/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/cron-jobs/) [[39]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/job/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/job/)。短作业越多，`kube_pod_status_phase`、kube-state-metrics 的 Pod/UID/container_id 相关指标 churn 越重 [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[49]](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)。

这类场景的关键误区是“单个 Job 很短、指标也不多，所以没事”。实际上，**越短命、越高频，越接近 churn 的最坏形态**：序列还没来得及形成稳定 chunk，就已经结束并被下一批新序列替代。

## 3）HPA / VPA

HPA 默认每 15 秒运行一次控制回路，根据指标不断扩缩 Pod [[36]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/autoscaling/horizontal-pod-autoscale/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/autoscaling/horizontal-pod-autoscale/)；VPA Updater 则会主动驱逐 Pod 以应用新 requests，直接造成 Pod 重建 [[43]](https://github.com/kubernetes/autoscaler/blob/master/vertical-pod-autoscaler/docs/components.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/autoscaler/blob/master/vertical-pod-autoscaler/docs/components.md)。二者都会把“资源调整”变成“Pod 生命周期 churn”，进而在 Prometheus 中变成 series churn [[36]](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/autoscaling/horizontal-pod-autoscale/)(https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/autoscaling/horizontal-pod-autoscale/) [[43]](https://github.com/kubernetes/autoscaler/blob/master/vertical-pod-autoscaler/docs/components.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/autoscaler/blob/master/vertical-pod-autoscaler/docs/components.md)。

如果你的自动扩缩本来就跟请求尖峰同步，那么监控系统会在**最需要稳定观测的时刻**遭遇最高 churn，这也是很多团队在流量峰值时“监控先看不清”的根因。

## 4）服务网格 sidecar（Istio/Envoy）

Istio 官方明确说，短生命周期指标会拖累 Prometheus 性能，而且 sidecar metrics 经常是高基数/高 churn 来源 [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。即使用 `sidecar.istio.io/statsEvictionInterval` 让 proxy 过期 inactive peers 的统计，也**只能减小 scrape 响应体积，不能阻止 Prometheus TSDB 的索引膨胀和 label churn**，因为那些唯一标签值一旦被 Prometheus 见过，series 就已经创建了 [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。

服务网格的难点在于，它把“网络通信关系”也变成了指标维度；而通信关系本身就是动态的，特别是在灰度、重试、熔断、跨版本并存时更明显。

## 5）错误的标签设计：Pod 名、UID、container_id、动态 URL、request_id、user_id

这是最常见、也最该优先治理的一类问题。

- kube-state-metrics 天然暴露 `pod`、`uid`、`pod_ip`、`container_id`、`image_id` 等高变化字段 [[49]](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)。
- Prometheus 官方明确反对把 user ID、email、其他无界集合放进 labels [[32]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/)。
- Grafana、New Relic 等实践文反复把 `session_id`、`user_id`、`device_id`、完整 URL path、request ID 视为高基数/高 churn 的典型错误 [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[52]](https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality)(https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality)。
- 合理做法是把路径模板化为稳定 route，例如 `/users/{id}/orders/{orderId}`，而不是原始 URL [[54]](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/)(https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/) [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)。

这里必须强调：**动态 URL 是同时制造高基数和高 churn 的“双杀标签”**。如果 URL 带订单号、会话号、随机 token，那么它既扩大稳态序列总数，又让每次新请求都可能创造新序列。

## 6）LLM 推理/训练、GPU 工作负载

LLM 场景并不天然高 churn，但它通常叠加了**GPU Pod 频繁扩缩、模型/适配器标签、多租户请求维度、以及 autoscaling 控制面**。vLLM 暴露 Prometheus 指标，并默认给所有指标带 `model_name` 标签 [[54]](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/)(https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/)；NVIDIA 的 DCGM exporter 又会把 GPU 指标和 Kubernetes Pod 关联起来 [[56]](https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/cloud-native/gpu-telemetry/latest/index.html)(https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/cloud-native/gpu-telemetry/latest/index.html) [[57]](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/monitoring-gpus-in-kubernetes-with-dcgm/)(https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/monitoring-gpus-in-kubernetes-with-dcgm/)。当 GPU Pod 快速扩缩或迁移节点时，GPU metrics 也会跟着 churn [[56]](https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/cloud-native/gpu-telemetry/latest/index.html)(https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/cloud-native/gpu-telemetry/latest/index.html) [[57]](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/monitoring-gpus-in-kubernetes-with-dcgm/)(https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/monitoring-gpus-in-kubernetes-with-dcgm/)。

这类场景常见的错误不是“指标太多”，而是把**模型名、租户、适配器、GPU UUID、Pod 名**同时放进标签。这样一来，模型层、资源层、编排层三组变化维度发生乘法放大。

### 根因排查优先级

| 优先级 | 排查层 | 看什么 | 常见结论 |
|---|---|---|---|
| P0 | Prometheus 自身 | `head_series`、created/removed、WAL、RW pending | 先确认是不是 churn，而非单纯高样本量 |
| P1 | Scrape pool / target | active/dropped targets、K8s SD 抖动 | 目标发现频繁变化或目标数暴涨 |
| P2 | TSDB 热点 | `seriesCountByMetricName`、`seriesCountByLabelPair` | 找到最贵的指标与标签 |
| P3 | Exporter / 应用 | 新增 labels、路径原样暴露、版本升级 | 根因通常在埋点或 exporter 配置 |
| P4 | Storage / remote | 队列积压、查询面抖动 | 判断是否已需要架构级扩容 |

---

## 怎么系统排查根因

最有效的排查顺序通常是：

1. **先看 Prometheus 自身是否真的在 churn**  
   看 `prometheus_tsdb_head_series`、created/removed 速率、WAL、remote write pending、查询时延 [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view) [[14]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

2. **看是哪个 job / target 在涨**  
   用 `/api/v1/targets`、`/api/v1/scrape_pools`，对比 active/dropped targets，定位是目标发现抖动还是 exporter 样本量暴涨 [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)。

3. **看 TSDB 热点**  
   用 `/api/v1/status/tsdb` 和 `promtool tsdb analyze` 找出最 churn 的 label pair / metric name [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/) [[1]](https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality)(https://www.robustperception.io/using-tsdb-analyze-to-investigate-churn-and-cardinality) [[60]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/command-line/promtool/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/command-line/promtool/)。

4. **沿链路逆推：服务发现 → relabel → exporter → 应用埋点**  
   确认是不是 Kubernetes SD 放进了太多目标、`metric_relabel_configs` 缺失、exporter 升级暴露更多指标、应用新加了 request_id/path/pod 名标签 [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/) [[60]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/command-line/promtool/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/command-line/promtool/) [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[52]](https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality)(https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality)。

一个高价值原则是：**能在生成侧解决，就不要留到 Prometheus 抓取侧再修**。Istio 官方甚至明确不推荐依赖 scrape-time label rewriting 来降基数，因为删标签可能造成 duplicate series，Prometheus 还不会自动做聚合 [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。

实操里，我建议再加两个动作：  
- **对照最近一次变更**：高 churn 十有八九与“新版本上线、exporter 升级、OTel resource attribute 提升、KSM 打开更多 metrics”同步发生。  
- **按控制平面分段排查**：应用埋点、exporter、service discovery、relabel、remote write、远端后端，不要一上来就查 PromQL 面板。

## Prometheus 原生栈内，系统性怎么解决

## 1）源头治理：这是收益最高的一层

### 指标设计规范
- 大多数指标应**没有 labels**；单指标 cardinality 尽量低于 10，超过 100 应重新评估设计 [[67]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/instrumentation/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/instrumentation/)。
- 严禁无界标签：`user_id`、`request_id`、`session_id`、`trace_id`、动态 path、IP、SQL 文本等 [[32]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/) [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[69]](https://www.cncf.io/blog/2025/07/22/prometheus-labels-understanding-and-best-practices/)(https://www.cncf.io/blog/2025/07/22/prometheus-labels-understanding-and-best-practices/)。
- 路径要模板化，只保留稳定 route / handler，而不是原始 URL [[54]](https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/)(https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/design/metrics/) [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)。
- 部署/环境类标签如 `cluster`、`region`、`environment` 更适合由 scrape target labels 注入，而不是应用自行随意带出 [[71]](https://prometheus.io/docs/instrumenting/writing_exporters/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/instrumenting/writing_exporters/)。

源头治理的收益高，是因为它直接减少了**新序列被创造出来的概率**。一旦错误标签进入 TSDB，后面的 relabel、recording rule、远端存储都只能“补救成本”，不能逆转“序列已经存在过”这件事。

### 直方图与 exemplar 的边界
- 需要跨实例聚合分位数时，优先 **Histogram**，而不是 Summary，因为 Summary quantile 不可聚合 [[72]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/histograms/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/histograms/) [[73]](https://prometheus.io/docs/specs/om/open_metrics_spec_2_0/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/specs/om/open_metrics_spec_2_0/)。
- 经典 histogram 的桶数会直接乘上其他 labels，因此 bucket 设计必须由 SLO 驱动，不能随便堆 [[66]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/the_zen/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/the_zen/) [[72]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/histograms/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/histograms/)。
- **Native histogram** 在较新文档中被认为通常优于 classic histogram，但旧版 feature flag 文档把它视为实验特性；这反映的是**版本演进**，不是纯粹观点冲突，生产使用必须看你当前版本状态 [[66]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/the_zen/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/the_zen/) [[75]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/3.2/feature_flags/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/3.2/feature_flags/)。
- exemplar 的作用是把聚合指标链接到 trace，不是把 trace_id/request_id 变成主标签 [[77]](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/fundamentals/exemplars/)(https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/fundamentals/exemplars/) [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)。

一个非常实用的边界判断是：**凡是你本来想放进日志或 trace 里做单请求定位的东西，通常都不该成为 metrics 主标签**。如果一定要保留排障跳转，用 exemplar；如果一定要保留长期统计，用聚合后的 route、operation、model_name 这类可枚举标签。

## 2）采集治理：控制目标数、样本数、标签数

### 抓取频率与目标范围
- 对不需要高实时性的目标，把 `scrape_interval` 从 15s 拉到 60s，可线性减少样本量；但官方也提醒，**减少 series 数通常比单纯调长抓取间隔更有效**，因为同一序列内样本可以压缩 [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。
- 用 `relabel_configs` 限制目标发现范围，用 `metric_relabel_configs` 在入库前删掉无价值 series [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/) [[80]](https://www.groundcover.com/learn/observability/prometheus-scraping)(https://www.groundcover.com/learn/observability/prometheus-scraping)。

### 保护阈值
Prometheus 官方提供了一组非常实用的保险丝：

- `sample_limit`
- `label_limit`
- `label_name_length_limit`
- `label_value_length_limit`
- `target_limit`
- `keep_dropped_targets`
- `body_size_limit` [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)

这些设置解决不了根因，但能防止“某次错误发布/某个 exporter 突变”直接把 Prometheus 打死 [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)。

这里要区分三类手段的价值：  
- **限制 scrape interval**：主要减样本；  
- **drop metric / target**：既减样本也减 series；  
- **drop label**：风险最高，因为可能造成碰撞。  
从治理收益看，优先级通常是 **删目标/删指标 > 限抓取频率 > 删标签**。

### 注意删标签的副作用
Grafana 和 Istio 都提醒：**删除某个标签前，必须确认删完后剩余标签仍能保持唯一性**，否则会制造 duplicate series，Prometheus 可能丢数据 [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。因此优先级应是：

1. 生成侧不创建错误标签；
2. Prometheus 侧优先 drop 整条 series、整类 metric、或无价值 bucket；
3. 最后才是 labeldrop，而且必须做碰撞评估 [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/) [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。

## 3）TSDB 与 remote write 治理：减伤，不是根治

- retention 主要是**磁盘治理**，不是 head 内存治理；缩短 retention 能减小长期盘占用，但对最近 2 小时 head/WAL 压力帮助有限 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。
- 开启 WAL compression 是低成本高收益选项，官方说可把 WAL 大小减半，CPU 额外开销很小 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。
- 如果使用 remote write，要谨慎调 `capacity`、`max_shards`、`max_samples_per_send`、`batch_send_deadline`，并同时监控 `samples_pending` 与 CPU/网络 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。
- **不要把“多开点 shard”当作万能解法**。官方已经说明 `max_shards` 过高会增加内存，近年的真实 issue 也显示 RW2.0 在高峰下并不会线性扩展 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[90]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/17277)(https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/17277)。

可以把 remote write 调优理解成一个具体的取舍：  
- `capacity` 太小，容易因单个 shard 阻塞拖垮全局；  
- `capacity` 太大，内存上升且 reshard 成本变高；  
- 官方建议通常设为 `max_samples_per_send` 的 **3–10 倍**，本质是在吞吐与内存之间取平衡 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。  
这能缓解“排队”，但**不能减少被排队的 series 数量**，所以不是根治。

### `stale_series_compaction_threshold` 什么时候有用
当你的痛点是**发布窗口后 stale series 在 head 中滞留太久**，它有现实价值；但代价是更频繁的 compaction 与额外 I/O。换句话说，它适合“发布波峰后尽快回落内存”，不适合拿来掩盖长期错误标签模型。

## 4）降维聚合：Recording Rules 是治理消费面的关键

Recording rule 会周期性执行 PromQL 并把结果存成新的 time series [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)。它最适合做两件事：

- 把高维原始指标聚合成低基数服务级指标，供 dashboard/alerting 使用 [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)。
- 预计算昂贵查询，减少面板每次都扫全量原始 series [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)。

但 recording rules **不能阻止原始 high-churn series 被创建**；它们解决的是“查询/告警成本”，不是“入库成本” [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)。所以正确顺序是：先减源头，再用 recording rules 稳定消费面。

一个常见误区是“既然 dashboard 只看聚合结果，那原始高维指标留着也没关系”。这通常是错的，因为原始序列仍然已经进入 head、WAL、index 和 remote write 队列，成本早就付掉了。

## 5）分片、联邦、HA：原生 Prometheus 的架构级缓冲

- **联邦（federation）** 适合把底层 Prometheus 的聚合结果汇总到上层，实现全局视图；但底层的高 churn 压力并没有消失，只是被分散到多个实例 [[93]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/federation)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/federation)。
- **功能分片 / 按业务域拆分 Prometheus**，适合在不引入复杂长期后端的前提下，把单实例压力摊开 [[86]](https://www.robustperception.io/scaling-and-federating-prometheus)(https://www.robustperception.io/scaling-and-federating-prometheus) [[87]](https://prometheus-operator.dev/docs/platform/high-availability/)(https://prometheus-operator.dev/docs/platform/high-availability/)。
- **HA 双副本 Prometheus** 解决的是单点问题，不解决 scale-out；Prometheus Operator 官方明确指出，HA 不等于水平扩展 [[87]](https://prometheus-operator.dev/docs/platform/high-availability/)(https://prometheus-operator.dev/docs/platform/high-availability/)。

一个很实用的判断是：  
- **单实例 OOM / replay 慢**：先考虑拆分或治理；  
- **多集群统一查询与长保留**：再考虑联邦、Thanos、Mimir、托管；  
- **只是想避免单点**：HA 双副本就够，但别把它误当扩容方案。

## 单体 Prometheus 扛不住时，架构上怎么选

## 1）原生 Prometheus + selective remote write
适合：
- 想最小改造获得长保留或集中归档；
- 本地 Prometheus 还能扛住近期写入和查询；
- 团队不想立刻引入复杂分布式系统 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)。

优点：
- 迁移最小，本地查询/告警不变 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

缺点：
- 本地 TSDB 与 remote write cache 压力仍在；
- 远端不可用超过约 2 小时，数据仍可能丢 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

## 2）Thanos
**设计哲学**：保留现有 Prometheus，外挂对象存储与全局查询层 [[95]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/) [[98]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)。  
适合：
- 已有很多 Prometheus，希望低摩擦补齐长保留、全局查询、HA 查询视图 [[95]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/) [[98]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)。

优点：
- 不用放弃 Prometheus；
- 有 sidecar、store gateway、query、compactor、downsampling 的成熟路径 [[95]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/) [[96]](https://thanos.io/blog/2023-11-20-life-of-a-sample-part-2/)(https://thanos.io/blog/2023-11-20-life-of-a-sample-part-2/) [[179]](https://thanos.io/v41.0/components/store.md/)(https://thanos.io/v41.0/components/store.md/)。

代价：
- 强依赖对象存储、index-header、缓存与 compactor；
- 全局查询 fanout 和长查调优复杂；
- 去重既有读时 dedup，也依赖后续 compaction，行为理解成本高 [[96]](https://thanos.io/blog/2023-11-20-life-of-a-sample-part-2/)(https://thanos.io/blog/2023-11-20-life-of-a-sample-part-2/) [[179]](https://thanos.io/v41.0/components/store.md/)(https://thanos.io/v41.0/components/store.md/) [[180]](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/61805066/how-deduplication-can-take-place-in-remote-object-storage-in-thanos-ecosystem)(https://stackoverflow.com/questions/61805066/how-deduplication-can-take-place-in-remote-object-storage-in-thanos-ecosystem)。

## 3）Grafana Mimir / Cortex 路线
**设计哲学**：从一开始就是多租户、远端写入、对象存储块后端、微服务拆分 [[151]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/) [[104]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/configure/configuration-parameters/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/configure/configuration-parameters/)。  
适合：
- 要做集中式监控平台；
- 多租户、全局查询、独立扩缩、长期存储都是刚需 [[103]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates) [[151]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/)。

优点：
- 水平扩展能力强；
- 查询与写入路径的工程优化多，Mimir 3.0 还引入 Kafka 解耦读写 [[173]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/) [[174]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/)；
- 官方公开了 MQE 在某些查询上 **92% 峰值内存下降、39% 更快** 的数字 [[107]](https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/)(https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/)。

代价：
- 组件多、缓存多、对象存储依赖重，运维复杂度最高之一 [[31]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/production-tips/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/production-tips/) [[152]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/references/architecture/deployment-modes/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/references/architecture/deployment-modes/) [[153]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/perform-a-rolling-update/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/manage/run-production-environment/perform-a-rolling-update/)。
- 近两年没有统一、同口径、官方 p50/p99 横向 benchmark；很多公开数字来自官方单项优化测试或厂商自测 [[107]](https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/)(https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/) [[174]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/) [[183]](https://victoriametrics.com/blog/mimir-benchmark/)(https://victoriametrics.com/blog/mimir-benchmark/)。

Mimir 3.0 对高 churn 的真正意义，不只是“更快”，而是**通过 Kafka 把写路径和读路径解耦**：写入在 broker 确认所有 records 已复制并持久化后成功，ingester 再异步消费；这样重查询不会像经典架构那样直接干扰在线写入 [[173]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/)。代价也公开得很清楚：默认不提供 read-after-write guarantee，如需 `X-Read-Consistency: strong`，查询会等待相应 offset，被显式转化为更高查询延迟 [[173]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/about-ingest-storage-architecture/)。

## 4）VictoriaMetrics
**设计哲学**：强调更简单的 TSDB 路径和更高资源效率；官方强烈建议**能不用 cluster 就别上 cluster** [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[154]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)。  
适合：
- 想比 Prometheus 更强的单机/集群承载能力；
- 但不想上 Mimir 那种重型微服务平台 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[154]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)。

优点：
- 单机版就能到很高规模；官方口径是单机可达 **100M active series / 2M samples/s**，集群版到 billions active series [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)。
- 不依赖 Prometheus remote read 做全局查询，避免其结构性低效 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)。

代价：
- 公开近两年的统一官方对照 benchmark 不多；
- 多租户需要 cluster 版 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)。

## 5）ClickHouse 类 Prometheus remote storage
ClickHouse 24.8 引入实验性的 TimeSeries engine，可通过 Prometheus remote write/read 兼容接入 [[114]](https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse)(https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse) [[115]](https://clickhouse.com/docs/interfaces/prometheus)(https://clickhouse.com/docs/interfaces/prometheus)。  
但 ClickHouse 官方自己也明确说：当前 Prometheus 查询路径仍是**把原始数据拉回 Prometheus 本地做 PromQL**，因此复杂或高基数长范围查询“当前并不理想” [[114]](https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse)(https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse)。  
结论：更适合**想把 metrics 放进通用 SQL/OLAP 底座**的团队，而不是“无缝替代成熟 Prometheus 长查平台” [[114]](https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse)(https://clickhouse.com/blog/evolution-of-sql-based-observability-with-clickhouse) [[115]](https://clickhouse.com/docs/interfaces/prometheus)(https://clickhouse.com/docs/interfaces/prometheus)。

### 一个重要现实：不要迷信“谁最快”
近两年公开对比里，**没有一个统一方法、统一硬件、统一缓存配置下的官方 p50/p99 横评**，能把 Thanos、Mimir、VictoriaMetrics、ClickHouse 一起公平比较 [[107]](https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/)(https://grafana.com/blog/faster-more-memory-efficient-performance-in-grafana-mimir-a-closer-look-at-mimir-query-engine/) [[174]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates/) [[108]](https://onidel.com/blog/prometheus-storage-comparison-2025)(https://onidel.com/blog/prometheus-storage-comparison-2025) [[181]](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8258)(https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8258)。你看到的大量“谁更快”数字，往往要么是**厂商自测**，要么是**用户个案**，只能参考，不能直接当结论 [[183]](https://victoriametrics.com/blog/mimir-benchmark/)(https://victoriametrics.com/blog/mimir-benchmark/) [[108]](https://onidel.com/blog/prometheus-storage-comparison-2025)(https://onidel.com/blog/prometheus-storage-comparison-2025) [[181]](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8258)(https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8258) [[185]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/casestudies/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/casestudies/)。

### 架构选型总表

| 方案 | 对高 churn 的吸收能力 | 本地 Prom 压力是否仍重 | 查询/长保留能力 | 运维复杂度 | 典型适用场景 |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|
| 单体 Prometheus | 低 | 是 | 低到中 | 低 | 单集群、短保留、问题主要在埋点 |
| Prom + selective remote write | 低到中 | **是** | 中 | 低到中 | 想先归档、先不重构 |
| Thanos | 中 | 底层 Prom 仍在 | 高 | 中到高 | 多 Prometheus 低摩擦接长期存储 |
| Mimir/Cortex | 高 | 可弱化本地 Prom 角色 | 高 | 高 | 平台化、多租户、独立扩缩 |
| VictoriaMetrics | 中到高 | 可较快替换单机瓶颈 | 中到高 | 中 | 追求资源效率与较简架构 |
| ClickHouse 类 | 中（写入）/低到中（PromQL 长查） | 视接法而定 | SQL/OLAP 强，PromQL 弱于成熟平台 | 中到高 | 想统一到分析底座 |

**推荐排序不是“谁最好”，而是“谁最匹配问题结构”**：  
- 根因未治：先别上重平台；  
- 已多集群且想少改：Thanos；  
- 已进入平台化多租户阶段：Mimir；  
- 想用更少资源承载更多时序：VictoriaMetrics；  
- 指标要与日志/事件一起做 SQL 分析：ClickHouse。

## 云厂商有没有现成方案

有，但它们大多是**“承受高 churn”**，不是**“替你修好高 churn”**。

## 1）AWS AMP
AMP 提供：

- 托管抓取：AWS managed collector / scraper，尤其面向 EKS，支持自动发现、自动扩缩和私网写入 workspace [[124]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-collector.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-collector.html) [[125]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-collector-how-to.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-collector-how-to.html)。
- 托管存储、规则与 Alertmanager [[119]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html)。
- `retentionPeriodInDays` 最多 **1095 天（3 年）** [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)。
- 默认 active time series limit 已提升到 **50M per workspace**，并可申请到 **1B** [[120]](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2025/07/amazon-managed-service-prometheus-50M-default-activeserieslimit/)(https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2025/07/amazon-managed-service-prometheus-50M-default-activeserieslimit/)。

对高 churn 最值得关注的新能力是：**label-based active series limits**。可以按 `{app, environment, team...}` 这样的标签集合单独限流，某个租户爆了只会 throttle 该标签集合，不会把整个 workspace 拖死 [[161]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/) [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)。AMP 还把这些维度暴露到 CloudWatch，如 `ActiveSeriesPerLabelSet`、`DiscardedSamplesPerLabelSet`，方便做告警与归因 [[171]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-CW-usage-metrics.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-CW-usage-metrics.html) [[161]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)。

边界：
- workspace 仍有 active series 和 ingestion rate 配额；写入采用 token bucket，持续超量会整批拒绝 [[119]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html) [[172]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/prometheus-service.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/prometheus-service.html)。
- 95 天是 AWS 在 2025-05 宣布的**最大查询跨度**，不应与 retention 混为一谈 [[127]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-queries-with-amazon-managed-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-queries-with-amazon-managed-prometheus/)。
- AMP 更像“吸收并隔离高 churn”，不是自动替你删错误标签 [[161]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/) [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)。

## 2）Azure Monitor managed service for Prometheus
Azure 提供：

- AKS / Azure Arc 深度集成，基于 Azure Monitor Agent + DCR 采集 [[130]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)。
- 托管存储、托管 recording/alert rules、Grafana/Portal 集成 [[130]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview) [[133]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-rule-groups)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-rule-groups)。
- **18 个月 retention**，包含在 ingestion 价格中 [[130]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview) [[131]](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/monitor/)(https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/monitor/) [[132]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/cost-usage)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/cost-usage)。

边界非常明确：

- 单 workspace 默认 **1,000,000 active time series**、**1,000,000 events/min**，可申请提额 [[122]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits) [[163]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)。
- 单 DCR 每分钟 **15,000 requests**、**50GB ingestion**，不可提额 [[122]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)。
- remote-write sidecar 公开可处理上限约 **150,000 unique time series**，超过可能因并发连接过多报错 [[122]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits) [[163]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)。
- 单次 PromQL 最长 **32 天**，每 query 有 series/samples/query cost 等限制 [[122]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/fundamentals/service-limits)。

Azure 官方对根因治理说得很直白：先识别高 cardinality metrics，再删不必要 labels，调 scrape interval，对高 volume metrics 使用 recording rules [[117]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice) [[163]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)。所以 Azure 也是“有承载能力，但根因仍要用户自己治”。

## 3）Google Cloud Managed Service for Prometheus
GMP 是三大云里**最像“直接把后端问题吞掉”**的方案：

- 基于 Monarch；
- fully managed、multi-cloud、cross-project；
- managed collection 可自动 deployed、scaled、sharded；
- **24 个月 retention**，保留费用包含在内 [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus) [[136]](https://cloud.google.com/managed-prometheus)(https://cloud.google.com/managed-prometheus) [[137]](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/devops-sre/managed-service-for-prometheus-price-cut)(https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/devops-sre/managed-service-for-prometheus-price-cut)。
- 官方明确写：**没有 active time series 或 total time series 的上限** [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)。

但这不代表无边界：

- 默认 ingest quota 仍是 **100,000 samples/s**（500 QPS × 200 samples），可申请提高 [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus) [[164]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/troubleshooting)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/troubleshooting)。
- 1 周后开始 downsampling：之后到 5 周为 1 分钟粒度，再往后为 10 分钟粒度 [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)。
- 官方专门有 cost controls 文档，要求用户通过 filters、sampling period、local aggregation 降低高 cardinality/high churn 成本 [[118]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)。

结论：Google 在“平台吸收能力”上最强，但在“是否应该把高 churn 原始数据全都写进去”上，官方仍建议用户在采集近端做聚合和过滤 [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus) [[118]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)。

## 4）阿里云
本次材料里，阿里云的官方信息最清晰。

- ACK 集成里，**Pro Edition** retention 为 **90 天**、collector fully managed、SLA 99.95%；**Basic Edition** retention 为 **7 天**、collector self-managed [[139]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster)。
- 计费支持两种模式：按 **remote-write data volume** 或按 **metric sample count** [[140]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-description/)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-description/)。
- 文档给出的示例中，同样的配置下，按 volume 计费可能远低于按 sample 计费 [[141]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-examples)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-examples)。

这说明阿里云已有托管 Prometheus 方案，尤其在 ACK 内集成较深；但公开材料更偏计费与版本能力，缺少像 AWS/Azure/GCP 那样细粒度的 active series、query cost、per-label limit 官方披露 [[139]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster) [[140]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-description/)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-description/) [[141]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-examples)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/prometheus/product-overview/billing-examples)。

如果你的选型范围还包括腾讯云、华为云等国内厂商，建议把三项能力单独拉清单核实：**活跃序列配额、最大查询跨度、是否有按租户/标签隔离的限流机制**。这三项往往比“是否兼容 PromQL”更能决定它们对高 churn 的真实承载边界；本次材料未提供可同口径横比的官方数据，因此不做排名。

## 这些云方案本质上解决了什么，没解决什么

### 解决/缓解了：
- 单机 Prometheus 的容量、保留期、对象存储、规则托管、多集群集中视图、collector 运维 [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus) [[119]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html) [[130]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview) [[139]](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster)(https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/ack/ack-managed-and-ack-dedicated/user-guide/use-managed-service-for-prometheus-to-monitor-an-ack-cluster)。
- 某些平台还提供 quota 观测、按标签集限流、自动分片或 managed collectors [[161]](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/)(https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/mt/optimizing-metrics-ingestion-with-amazon-managed-service-for-prometheus/) [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html) [[136]](https://cloud.google.com/managed-prometheus)(https://cloud.google.com/managed-prometheus)。

### 没真正解决：
- 错误的 label 模型；
- 无界标签；
- 短命 Pod/Job/sidecar 指标泛滥；
- “为了排障，把 request_id/pod_name/path 全塞进 metrics” 这种源头问题 [[117]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice) [[118]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls) [[163]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/azure-monitor-workspace-scaling-best-practice) [[165]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-workspace-configuration.html)。

**结论很简单：云厂商更擅长把坏工作负载“吞进去”，但不会让坏工作负载“变正确”**。

## 企业该怎么选路线

## 适合继续优化原生 Prometheus
如果你满足大多数条件：

- 单集群或少量集群；
- 保留期主要是天到周；
- 全局查询不是核心诉求；
- 团队更熟 Prometheus，不想维护复杂平台；
- 问题还主要集中在错误标签、Kubernetes churn、remote write 配置不当 [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[67]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/instrumentation/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/instrumentation/)。

先做：
1. 删无界标签；
2. 路径模板化；
3. 限目标、限样本、限标签；
4. 调 scrape interval；
5. 做 recording rule；
6. 再考虑 remote write [[32]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/) [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/) [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

## 适合先接远端存储
如果你需要：

- 更长保留；
- 合规归档；
- 跨几个集群做集中查询；
- 但仍想保留现有 Prometheus 抓取和本地告警 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[7]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/storage/) [[158]](https://docs.azure.cn/en-us/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-remote-write)(https://docs.azure.cn/en-us/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-remote-write)。

建议：
- 不要一开始全量镜像所有原始 high-churn series；
- 先做 selective shipping，只送关键业务指标、聚合结果和合规数据 [[52]](https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality)(https://newrelic.com/blog/observability/manage-prometheus-cardinality) [[118]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus/cost-controls)。

## 适合上 Thanos
如果你已经有一批 Prometheus，希望：

- 低摩擦接入长期存储；
- 做全局查询；
- 但不想把采集栈彻底重做 [[95]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/) [[98]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/design.md/)。

## 适合上 Mimir / 平台型后端
如果你已经是：

- 多团队共享监控平台；
- 多租户、长保留、全局查询、规则统一评估都很重要；
- 愿意投入对象存储、缓存、微服务、SRE 运维 [[103]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates) [[151]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/get-started/about-grafana-mimir-architecture/) [[152]](https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/references/architecture/deployment-modes/)(https://grafana.com/docs/mimir/latest/references/architecture/deployment-modes/)。

## 适合上 VictoriaMetrics
如果你想要：

- 比 Prometheus 更高的资源效率；
- 但希望架构尽量简单；
- 单租户或较简单多租户为主 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[154]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/cluster-victoriametrics/)。

## 适合直接上云托管
如果你：

- 希望少运维；
- 工作负载高度云原生；
- 可以接受云厂商配额、计费和能力边界；
- 更关心“稳定可用”，而不是“所有底层完全可控” [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus) [[119]](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html)(https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP_quotas.html) [[130]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-metrics-overview)。

### 一个可执行的决策矩阵

| 决策条件 | 原生 Prometheus | 远端存储 | Thanos | Mimir | VictoriaMetrics | 云托管 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 根因仍在标签模型 | **先修根因** | 不建议直接上 | 不建议直接上 | 不建议直接上 | 不建议直接上 | 不建议直接上 |
| 多集群全局查询 | 弱 | 中 | **强** | **强** | 中到强 | 强 |
| 长保留 | 弱 | 中 | 强 | 强 | 强 | 强 |
| 多租户隔离 | 弱 | 弱 | 中 | **强** | 中 | 视厂商而定 |
| 团队运维能力 | 低 | 低到中 | 中 | 高 | 中 | 低 |
| 对高 churn 吸收 | 低 | 低到中 | 中 | 高 | 中到高 | 中到高 |
| 改造成本 | 低 | 低 | 中 | 高 | 中 | 中 |
| 推荐优先级 | 小规模优先 | 过渡方案 | 已有多 Prom 最合适 | 平台化首选 | 资源效率优先 | 少运维优先 |

### 一个打分示例：如何把矩阵落地

假设你是这样一家公司：  
- 8 个 Kubernetes 集群；  
- 发布频繁，Pod churn 明显；  
- 需要 12 个月保留；  
- 希望多团队共享；  
- 平台团队人数有限，不想维护过重微服务系统。  

给每项 1–5 分，权重如下：长保留 25%，多集群查询 20%，高 churn 吸收 25%，运维复杂度 20%，迁移成本 10%。

**方案 A：Thanos**  
- 长保留 5  
- 多集群查询 5  
- 高 churn 吸收 3  
- 运维复杂度 3  
- 迁移成本 4  
加权分 = 5×0.25 + 5×0.20 + 3×0.25 + 3×0.20 + 4×0.10 = **4.0**

**方案 B：Mimir**  
- 长保留 5  
- 多集群查询 5  
- 高 churn 吸收 5  
- 运维复杂度 1  
- 迁移成本 2  
加权分 = 5×0.25 + 5×0.20 + 5×0.25 + 1×0.20 + 2×0.10 = **3.9**

**方案 C：云托管（以 GMP/AMP 一类为代表）**  
- 长保留 5  
- 多集群查询 5  
- 高 churn 吸收 4  
- 运维复杂度 5  
- 迁移成本 3  
加权分 = 5×0.25 + 5×0.20 + 4×0.25 + 5×0.20 + 3×0.10 = **4.55**

这个例子说明，**“技术能力最强”不等于“当前最优”**。如果团队人手有限，云托管可能优于自建 Mimir；如果合规或成本要求不允许重度依赖公有云，Thanos 又可能比云托管更合适。矩阵的意义不是给出唯一答案，而是把“为什么选它”透明化。

## 推荐的落地顺序

1. **先做基线**：  
   记录 `head_series`、created/removed rate、WAL、remote write pending、top metrics/top labels [[11]](https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view)(https://oneuptime.com/blog/post/2026-01-25-prometheus-metric-cardinality/view) [[13]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/querying/api/) [[14]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-troubleshoot-remote-write-issues-in-prometheus/)。

2. **先治源头**：  
   删无界标签、路径模板化、禁用无价值 exporter 指标、限制 KSM/sidecar 暴露面 [[32]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/naming/) [[49]](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md)(https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/blob/main/docs/metrics/workload/pod-metrics.md) [[47]](https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)(https://istio.io/latest/about/faq/metrics-and-logs/)。

3. **再治采集**：  
   relabel/drop、sample_limit、target_limit、scrape interval 分级 [[5]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/) [[34]](https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)(https://grafana.com/blog/how-to-manage-high-cardinality-metrics-in-prometheus-and-kubernetes/)。

4. **再稳消费面**：  
   recording rules、聚合指标、减少 dashboard 对原始高维数据的直接依赖 [[64]](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/recording_rules/)。

5. **若仍不够，再做架构升级**：  
   remote write → Thanos / VM / Mimir / 托管服务，按你的组织能力和目标选 [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/) [[95]](https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/)(https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/quick-tutorial.md/) [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[103]](https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates)(https://grafana.com/blog/grafana-mimir-3-0-release-all-the-latest-updates) [[116]](https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)(https://docs.cloud.google.com/stackdriver/docs/managed-prometheus)。

6. **保留回滚路径**：  
   初期双写、保留本地 Prometheus 查询与告警能力、确认远端稳定后再切主查询面；Prometheus 本地仍然可以继续写本地存储，因此 remote write 试点天然适合渐进迁移 [[89]](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/)(https://docs.victoriametrics.com/victoriametrics/faq/) [[158]](https://docs.azure.cn/en-us/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-remote-write)(https://docs.azure.cn/en-us/azure-monitor/metrics/prometheus-remote-write) [[2]](https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)(https://prometheus.io/docs/practices/remote_write/)。

### 验证指标与回滚条件

实施后不要只看“有没有报错”，而要看以下结果是否真的改善：  
- `head_series` 是否在一个完整发布周期后回到稳定基线附近；  
- `created_total` / `removed_total` 是否显著回落；  
- `samples_pending` 是否不再持续累积；  
- 关键 dashboard / rule group 的执行时间是否稳定；  
- Prometheus 重启恢复时间是否缩短；  
- 发布窗口是否仍出现 OOM、CPU 尖峰、查询抖动。  

如果这些核心指标没有改善，只是把数据写到了更远的地方，那就不是治理成功，而只是**成本转移**。

## 最后一句话

**高流失率首先是“指标与平台模型不匹配”的问题，其次才是“存储系统扛不扛得住”的问题。**  
如果你先修模型，再选架构，大多数问题能在原生 Prometheus 范围内缓解；如果你先换后端、不修源头，只是把高 churn 变成更贵的对象存储账单、更复杂
